title: Fields, Negotiation, Compression, Validators, and Caching · Contract Lens: Compression Vary Secrets
summary: The service naïvely splits repeated fields, sniffs content, omits Vary, compresses secrets, caches personalized responses, and computes unstable validators. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts compression vary secrets increment in representation selection, compression, and cache contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Negotiate content coding, emit correct Vary, bound decoded size, avoid secret-dependent compression, and preserve streaming backpressure.
Validate Content-Type parameters and select an acceptable representation with quality, specificity, fallback, and 406 or 415 behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
